final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Chinese ethnic minority costume museum infographic in the restrained precision of national museum exhibition panels, designed for collection and study.

Style/medium: museum exhibition infographic with the quiet authority of archival documentation, matte paper surface of aged rice paper, the hush of scholarly reverence
Composition: fixed five-zone layout — top header band, left structural breakdown with callout lines, upper-right material texture panel, middle-right pattern/color symbolism panel, bottom wearing sequence flowchart with feature summary; centered full-figure standing subject in traditional attire
Subject: Yi ethnic women's ceremonial attire from Daliangshan, Sichuan — complete ensemble with "查尔瓦" (woolen cape), "百褶裙" (pleated skirt), embroidered blouse, silver ornament belt, and headwrap
Scene/backdrop: warm rice paper ground with subtle fiber texture, the generous breathing room of museum-grade presentation
Lighting/mood: even archival illumination, the sacred stillness of objects held in institutional trust
Color palette: warm honey earth tones, indigo blue, ox-blood red, silver-white accents, the temperature of heritage preserved
Materials/textures: hand-woven wool with visible fiber structure, wax-resist dyed cotton with crackle patterns, hammered silver with matte oxidation, embroidered silk with raised satin stitch
Text (verbatim):
主标题：彝族服饰图鉴 · 四川大凉山女子盛装
副标题：国家级非物质文化遗产 · 传统纺织与银饰工艺
导语：大凉山彝族服饰以羊毛披毡、百褶长裙、刺绣上衣和银饰腰带构成完整盛装体系，承载族群历史记忆与身份象征。
结构标注：查尔瓦披毡 / 百褶长裙 / 刺绣对襟衣 / 银扣腰带 / 三角包头
材质说明：手纺羊毛 · 火草麻混纺 · 植物蓝靛染 · 手工打制银饰
纹样寓意：羊角纹象征繁衍 / 火镰纹代表光明 / 水波纹寓意生生不息
色彩含义：黑为大地根基 / 红为火焰生命 / 黄为丰收喜悦
核心特征：左衽衣制 · 百褶工艺 · 银饰压襟 · 羊毛御寒
Constraints: all text in Simplified Chinese, clear legible typography, accurate structural annotations, realistic material textures, museum-grade information hierarchy
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce styling, anime illustration, cosplay costume, incorrect structural labels, illegible text, fake material textures, excessive decorative elements
